name: Coleslaw and Salad Cream
intro: We don’t have many salads in Nigerian cuisine but the one you’re guaranteed to find at most functions, served alongside Jollof Rice and Moin Moin, is the wonderfully simple and delicious coleslaw. Serve it chilled with your main meal and it provides a cooling contrast to any spice or heat. Just wonderful! Here I will show you my recipe for homemade salad cream in case you are unable to find a good quality vegan brand.

ingredients.item: 1/4 cup sunflower oil Salt to taste
SAVOURY SNACKS, LIGHT MEALS AND SIDES

method: Place the shredded carrot and cabbage in a large salad bowl and set aside.

To make the salad cream dressing, place the tofu, lemon juice, garlic and oil in a blender and blend until everything is smooth and well combined. You may need to scrape down the sides of the blender at intervals to make sure everything blends together. You should have a silky smooth and well emulsified salad dressing.

Add your desired amount of dressing to the shredded cabbage and carrot, mix well, cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or until you are ready to serve. Any leftover salad cream can be stored in the fridge for up to 3 days.
